scripts.build:images: echo 'Use GitHub Actions workflows (.github/workflows/images*.yml) for canonical image builds'
scripts.generate:platform-api: speakeasy generate sdk --lang typescript --schema ./client-sdks/platform/openapi.json --out client-sdks/platform/typescript && pnpm -C ./client-sdks/platform/typescript build
scripts.generate:manager-api: speakeasy generate sdk --lang typescript --schema ./client-sdks/manager/openapi.json --out client-sdks/manager/typescript && pnpm -C ./client-sdks/manager/typescript build
scripts.test:examples:published-strict: pnpm -C examples install --force --frozen-lockfile --config.link-workspace-packages=false --config.prefer-workspace-packages=false && cargo build -p alien-cli --bin alien && pnpm -C examples test:projects
